info.description: Manages shift assignments for a plant by retrieving existing assignments and labor non-availability, and assigning shifts and work centers to a list of labors under a given supervisor — all within a specified date range.
info.title: Labor

post.summary: Retrieves labor shift assignments for a plant within a specified date range, with optional filters for shift and supervisor.
post.description: Fetches labor shift assignments, including non-availability, for shop floor supervisors in a specified plant over a defined date range. You may apply optional filters for shift and supervisor to narrow the results, or omit them to retrieve all assignments within the given period.

400.description: Wrong format or structure of the provided request body.

401.description: You are not authorized to call this resource.

403.description: Access denied. You did not have the required permissions to access the resource.

404.description: One of the related elements is not found.

post.summary: Assigns shifts and work centers to selected workforce.
post.description: This endpoint assigns specified shifts and work centers to a list of workforce for a given plant and supervisor, within a defined date range. It allows shift planning based on operational needs and supports optional assignment of work centers.

400.description: The request body format or structure is invalid.

401.description: You are not authorized to access this resource. Authentication is required.

403.description: Access denied. You do not have the necessary permissions to access this resource.

404.description: One or more referenced elements (e.g., shift, labor, or work center) were not found.

500.description: An unexpected error occurred on the server.

correlationId.description: Contains a correlation ID for the error.

availability.description: Specifies the availability of the user.

duration.description: Specifies the duration of the work center assigned.

endDate.description: Specifies the end date of the shift.

endTime.description: Specifies the end time of the work center assigned on the shift.

maximumResource.description: Specifies the maximum number of people that can work on work center.

mininumResource.description: Specifies the minimum number of people that can work on work center.

qualification.description: Specifies the qualification/certification of the user.

shiftModel.description: Specifies the shift model in which the user is currently in.

startDate.description: Specifies the start date of the shift.

startTime.description: Specifies the start time of the work center assigned on the shift.

endDate.description: The horizon end date till when shift plans needs to be fetched. Format(YYYYMMDD).

plant.description: The plant for which the request is executed.

startDate.description: The horizon start date from when the shift plans needs to be fetched. Format(YYYYMMDD).

user.description: The email ID of the supervisor who wants to see the shift plans for the labors assigned.

shift.description: The shift for which the shift plans needs to be fetched. If not provided, all shift models will be considered.

plant.description: The plant where the shift assignments are being made.

supervisor.description: The email address of the supervisor responsible for the assignments.

startDate.description: The start date of the assignment period, in YYYYMMDD format.

endDate.description: The end date of the assignment period, in YYYYMMDD format.

shiftAssignments.description: A list of shift assignment objects to be applied within the given date range, each containing:

shift.description: The name of the shift to be assigned (e.g., “Morning SHIFT”, “Evening SHIFT”).

labor.description: List of workforce email addresses to be assigned to the shift.

workCenter.description: The work center where the workforce will be assigned.

successfulAllocation.description: List of labors successfully assigned to shifts.

failedAllocation.description: List of labors that could not be assigned to shifts.

labor.description: Email ID of the labor who was successfully assigned.

shift.description: Shift to which the labor was successfully assigned.

labor.description: Email ID of the labor who could not be assigned.

shift.description: Shift to which the labor was attempted to be assigned.

allocationDate.description: Date when the allocation was attempted

errorMessage.description: Reason for the failure in assignment.

x-sap-shortText: Retrieves the shift assignments including non-availability of assigned labors.

regionHost.description: The data center where SAP Digital Manufacturing is provisioned for your organization.

tokenHost.description: The authentication server where SAP Digital Manufacturing is provisioned for your organization.
